meaning: 纳马夸兰[非洲西南部一地区]
examples: The Namaqualand spring flowers are world famous.
These images are of Pseudosthenarus rozeni, a legume-feeding plant bug from the Namaqualand region of South Africa.
Namaqualand in the Northern Cape Region of South Africa, between the Orange River and the wild coast witnesses a natural flower phenomenon that is regarded as a natural wonder of the world.
